category_sources: source_facts.description says it evaluates IAM permissions in AWS; official README describes IAM risk analysis for AWS accounts and organizations.
display_name_sources: Official README title is Principal Mapper and notes the PMapper abbreviation.
docs_sources: Official GitHub wiki is referenced by the README for getting started, CLI reference, and library reference.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official NCC Group GitHub repository; NCC Group pages also identify that repository as the hosted project.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions AWS IAM permissions; official README describes AWS IAM graph modeling, privilege escalation checks, and command-line use.
